title: Carosi XII Academy of Medicine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Carosi XII Academy of Medicine''' was a school on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Carosi XII]]. It was known to be sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], as were most of the [[Carosite]]s. However, not all of its [[Academy|students]] held these sympathies, such as [[Cinto Alaras]] who went on to work for [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
